title: Castle Hill Kitchen & Laundry Renovation
summary: Castle Hill renovation combining a kitchen upgrade with a cleaner, more resolved laundry fitout.
heroAlt: Castle Hill kitchen and laundry renovation with bright white cabinetry
overview: This Castle Hill project ties two practical spaces together: the kitchen and the laundry. It works well as a Hills District case study because it shows how joinery can improve the main entertaining zone and the utility side of the home at the same time.

afterImages.alt: Castle Hill laundry renovation with stacked appliances
afterImages.caption: Completed Castle Hill laundry with stacked appliances, white cabinetry and a cleaner utility layout.

afterImages.alt: Castle Hill kitchen renovation before and after view
afterImages.caption: Before-and-after comparison showing the updated Castle Hill kitchen with island seating and brighter cabinetry.
Kitchen storage detail from the Castle Hill renovation.

beforeImages.alt: Castle Hill kitchen and laundry before renovation
beforeImages.caption: Original condition before the Castle Hill kitchen and laundry renovation began.

spaces.title: Laundry
spaces.text: The laundry fitout brought cleaner cabinetry, better appliance placement and a more finished daily-use space.

outcome: Together, the kitchen and laundry feel more intentional and easier to use, with cabinetry that lifts both the visual finish and the everyday function of the rooms.
ctaText: If you are planning a kitchen or laundry renovation in Castle Hill, send through your current photos and we can help review the next step.
